name: TCIL_ExportDdop
title: TCIL_ExportDdop
syntax: long TCIL_ExportDdop(dbNode client, char ddopPath[]); // form 1
long TCIL_ExportDdop(dword addressClient, char ddopPath[]); // form 2
long TCIL_ExportDdop(dbNode tc, dbNode client, char ddopPath[]); // form 3
long TCIL_ExportDdop(dbNode tc, dword addressClient, char ddopPath[]); // form 4
description: Exports the device descriptor object pool of the Task Controller client into a file.

parameters.name: client
parameters.description: Task Controller client which provides the device descriptor object pool with corresponding sections.

parameters.name: addressClient
parameters.description: Address of the Task Controller client which provides the device descriptor object pool with corresponding sections.

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: Task Controller simulation node to apply the function.

parameters.name: ddopPath
parameters.description: Path of the target DDOP file (*.xml).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
